Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respones To (1) Form Interrogatrories Aa To Respondents, And (2) That Truth Of The Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted As To J.E. Williams, Ect.
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Evelyn Dixon. Anita Steberg for Benjamin Smith and James Williams.

The Court granted the Petition to Transfer to Santa Clara County (subject to review of the order). The Motion to Compel set for June 14, 2012 is ordered off calendar to be reset in Santa Clara Superior Court.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition To Set Aside Trust And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; For Return Of Property; For Br
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Continued To May-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Evelyn Dixon (Petitioner). Anita Steburg for and with James Williams and Benjamin Smith (Respondent).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to proper venue. Ms. Steburg reported that the San Francisco property was sold in October 2011 and that they have amended the death certificate to reflect that the place of residence was San Jose and not San Francisco at the time of the death. Both petitions were continued to May 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the amended death certificate is filed by that date, the Court will grant the Petition to Transfer to Santa Clara County and set a status date to complete the tranfer. No appearance will be required on May 29, 2012. Ms. Steburg will submit a proposed order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

Petition To Set Aside Trust And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; For Return Of Property; For Br
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Continued To May-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Continued To Mar-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Evelyn Dixon. Anita Steburg for and with James Williams and for Benjamin Smith (Co-Trustees).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of venue. The Petition to Set Aside Trust, etc. and the Petition to Transfer were continued to March 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the complete Trust instrument for the Court to determine who needs to be served and for filing of the Proof of Service.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.
